prestazioni: Audi-sourced 6.0L W12 (engine code: **CEA**) forced-induction conversion via **Garrett GT4202R** turbocharger (1.2 bar boost) with **Precision Turbo 6266** wastegate, paired with a **Weistec Engineering W12 Stage 3** forged internals kit (Mahle pistons, Carrillo rods, billet crank) and **ARP Custom W12 head studs** for 850+ HP reliability

**Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM X-Series** wideband O2 sensors and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158861** 1,200cc injectors, calibrated for E85 flex-fuel via **Fuelab Prodigy V2** pump and **Radium Engineering** surge tank

**Öhlins TTX40** 3-way adjustable coilovers with **SPYKER-specific** billet aluminum top mounts, **Eibach ERS** helper springs, and **Tillet B12** carbon-Kevlar racing seats with **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses for 1.5G lateral grip via **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (265/35R19 front, 305/30R20 rear) on **HRE FF01** forged wheels (19x10, 20x12)
estetica: **Zagato Evo GT-specific** carbon-fiber widebody kit with **Rocket Bunny** overfenders (modified for SPYKER chassis clearance) and **Vorsteiner** front splitter with **Aeromotions** active rear wing (3-position adjustability, 200kg downforce at 200km/h)

**Brembo GT-R** 6-piston monobloc calipers (front) and **AP Racing CP9660** 4-piston calipers (rear) with **DBA 5000 Series** two-piece rotors (380mm front, 356mm rear), painted **SPYKER Orange** with **Goodridge G-Stop** braided lines

**VIP Modular** titanium exhaust system with **Akrapovič** 3.5-inch carbon-fiber tips (dual side-exit, **SPYKER-exclusive** X-pipe design) and **DEI Titanium** heat wrap for the **W12 headers**, paired with a **Forge Motorsport** blow-off valve (recirculating, **SPYKER W12-specific** flange)
